results.requirement_text: The system shall support 500 concurrent users viewing reports without errors.

test_cases.title: Verify system performance with 500 concurrent users
test_cases.objective: Validate system performance under heavy load
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.
Test environment is set up to simulate 500 concurrent users

steps.expected_result: System handles the load without errors

assumptions: Test environment specifications (hardware, network, browser configurations) are adequate
Load generation tool or framework to simulate 500 concurrent users is available
Metrics collection method for error detection is in place
